apps.name: Speaker Fix
apps.tagline: Fix your iPhone speaker in one tap
apps.audience: iPhone owners with quiet, muffled, or distorted speaker — especially after water, dust, or drops
apps.problem: Calls are too quiet, music sounds muddy, people ask you to use speakerphone because they can't hear you
features: Instant volume boost without visiting a repair shop

apps.name: Extract Audio from Video
apps.tagline: Convert video to MP3 on iPhone in seconds
apps.audience: iPhone users who want music, voice, or lecture audio from videos without uploading files to the web
apps.problem: Online converters are slow, sketchy, and upload your private videos — you just need an MP3 from a clip on your phone
features: Video to MP3 on device (MP4, MOV)
Share Sheet from Photos or Files
Free core extraction, optional in-app purchases

apps.name: Make Blur
apps.tagline: Blur background and faces on iPhone in seconds
apps.audience: iPhone users who want portrait-style background blur, creative photo effects, or privacy-safe sharing without complicated editors
apps.problem: Portrait mode only works on some shots, other blur apps are paywalled or confusing, and you need to blur backgrounds or faces before posting group photos
features: Face blur for privacy on group shots
Seven blur styles: Bokeh, motion, Gaussian, ghosting, pixelate, hexagonal, crystalize
Custom brush to blur exactly where you want
Freemium — core tools free, optional in-app purchases

apps.name: Video To Photo - Grab Frame
apps.tagline: Extract exact photo frames from video on iPhone
apps.audience: iPhone users, creators, and educators who need precise still images from video without desktop tools
apps.problem: You need the exact frame from a clip, but browser tools require uploads and usually lack precise frame-level control
features: Exact frame selection with video scrubbing
Export as JPG, PNG, or HEIC
